title: NATIONAL CHANGE OF ADDRESS
name: NATIONAL CHANGE OF ADDRESS
statement_of_work: The Contractor will provide file-based National Change of Address (NCOA) services, including all the task required to update CA DMV Records received with address changes from the United States Postal Service NCOA database, address standardization, zip + 4 codes, and delivery point barcodes, via electronic delivery as described in RFO Section III, Statement of Work.
deliverables: Provide file-based National Change of Address (NCOA) services
Provide via electronic delivery as described in RFO Section III
description: The Contractor will provide file-based National Change of Address (NCOA) services, including all the task required to update CA DMV Records received with address changes from the United States Postal Service NCOA database, address standardization, zip + 4 codes, and delivery point barcodes, via electronic delivery as described in RFO Section III, Statement of Work.
